_comment: Commerce Phase 2A approval gate config. Fail-closed default -- see modules/commerce/approval_gate.py. phase_2_cto_gate_satisfied must stay false until the full CTO gate checklist in docs/RESEARCH/COMMERCE/SECURITY_COMPLIANCE_GATE.md §11 is satisfied by a human.
